title: The Thief Who Swallowed a Star
description: Rook is the best pickpocket in the harbor city of Tamber, until the night he steals a glowing marble off a sleeping wizard and, in a panic, swallows it. Now there's a star inside him, the wizard wants it back, and dragons can apparently smell it from three kingdoms away. Rook just wanted enough coin for a warm bed. A fun adventure fantasy about getting in way over your head.

chapters.title: A Bad Night to Be Greedy
